marketing.subtitle: Authentication, billing, and team accounts — wired in before you write your first feature.
marketing.moduleAuthDesc: Email and password, sessions, and sign-out are ready on day one. Swap the copy, not the plumbing.
marketing.moduleBillingDesc: Checkout, plan changes, and webhooks connect straight to Stripe — no billing code to write.
marketing.moduleTeamsDesc: Every account starts inside a team, with roles and invites ready before your first user signs up.
marketing.ctaTitle: Your product starts on page one.
marketing.ctaSubtitle: Everything above ships with every app in the factory. What you build on top of it is yours.

pricing.title: One foundation. Pick your plan.
pricing.subtitle: Every plan ships with the full scaffold — auth, billing, and team accounts included. Plus adds priority support and early access as your team grows.

insightMessages.activitySpike: Unusual account activity on {day}: {count} events vs a daily average of {avg}.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.invoiceNote: Required for your invoice (factura): tax ID and legal name.
checkout.invalid: Check the document number and legal name.
checkout.noPlanDesc: Pick a plan on the pricing page to start checkout.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.description: Electronic invoices (SIFEN) emitted for your team's payments.
invoices.emptyDesc: An invoice is emitted automatically after each payment.
